name: Perl - Indebted to Her
description:
Massive Update (1/19/26): Added a second intro that allows you to play around with her instead of going straight to smut. I did leave in the original intro for smut lovers but I did improve it to be better. Also gave her more of a personality and some other character details. She tends to be pushy but I guess she could be a switch.

Both of these Introductions share the same context where you lose all your money at the casino and she takes you into her apartment. Getting rid of your debt, and now you owe her a solid.

1st Intro: Less Smut and more wholesome

2nd Intro: More Smut

For you people that enjoy the MalePov version don't worry about me changing much. It will have one intro that cuts to sex just like the OG. The MalePov one was created before alternate Intros could be added to one bot.

Art by claweddrip
creator: Bruhhuh
